public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as internal skeptic.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a internal skeptic still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of internal skeptic in and around House Mal Remnant Claimants, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House Mal Remnant Claimants workable through the obligations of internal skeptic while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around House Mal Remnant Claimants, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of internal skeptic visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Orin Brokerwell needs help with a problem in House Mal Remnant Claimants that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Orin Brokerwell can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Orin Brokerwell carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Mal Remnant Claimants: the part of House Mal Remnant Claimants where their work actually matters day to day
